title: erigeron involucratus
intro: Erigeron involucratus, also known as the Downy Fleabane, is a perennial plant in the daisy family that is native to North America and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that may help to reduce pain and prevent infection. The health benefits of Erigeron involucratus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Erigeron involucratus can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal properties, and it is also used in some herbal remedies to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
